title: Remaining Four Original Faust Members Announce Four New Albums: Hear A Track From Each
summary:
Krautrock greats Faust have been around for over half a century in various permutations. Today, the group's four surviving original members announced a fun initiative: They're each releasing their own solo album. You know, like KISS! Bureau B will release all four LPs simultaneously in September.

The post Remaining Four Original Faust Members Announce Four New Albums: Hear A Track From Each appeared first on Stereogum.

fullArticle:
Krautrock greats Faust have been around for over half a century in various permutations. Today, the group's four surviving original members announced a fun initiative: They're each releasing their own solo album. You know, like KISS! Bureau B will release all four LPs simultaneously in September.

Here's a little breakdown of the four records:

With Unbegunden, Hans Joachim Irmler returns to the elemental power of sound itself, creating a solo work of immersive electronics, organ drones and spontaneous creation that channels Faust's most transformative and destabilising impulses.

Jean-Hervé Péron's MOI presents a deeply personal yet profoundly communal record, drawing together a wide network of collaborators in a playful, moving and unpredictable collage of musique concrète, spoken word, ...
